# Pull request

**Summary**
What does this change do, and why?

**Related issue**
Closes #

**Type of change**

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Catalogue update (added/removed/retitled UT1 category)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling / CI

**Checklist**

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (or justified in the description)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
